headline: Qualcomm Nears Deal for AI Chip Startup Modular
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Qualcomm Inc. is in advanced talks to acquire Modular Inc. in a transaction valuing the artificial intelligence infrastructure software company at about $4 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.Most Read from BloombergSpaceX Falls for Third Day, Erases $600 Billion in Market ValueStocks Fall as SpaceX’s Rout Offsets US-Iran Hopes: Markets WrapIran Says Hormuz Closed Again as Talks With US Set to OpenUS and Iran Make ‘Progress’ in Talks, Aim to Keep Hormuz OpenMeta

content.title: Qualcomm Nears Deal for AI Chip Startup Modular
content.summary: (Bloomberg) -- Qualcomm Inc. is in advanced talks to acquire Modular Inc. in a transaction valuing the artificial intelligence infrastructure software company at about $4 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.Most Read from BloombergSpaceX Falls for Third Day, Erases $600 Billion in Market ValueStocks Fall as SpaceX’s Rout Offsets US-Iran Hopes: Markets WrapIran Says Hormuz Closed Again as Talks With US Set to OpenUS and Iran Make ‘Progress’ in Talks, Aim to Keep Hormuz OpenMeta
